transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigator, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to know if physical therapy is covered under my plan. I have Bright Path PPO 250.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me check that for you. Yes, physical therapy is covered under Bright Path PPO 250 at an in-network copay of thirty dollars per visit.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh good. Do I need a referral first, or can I just book something?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No referral needed. In fact, Dr. Renata Cole at Oakview Physical Therapy has an opening this Thursday at 2:15 PM if you'd like it.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Really? That's fast. Is she in-network?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: She is fully in-network with your plan, so you'd just owe the thirty dollar copay for that visit.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, let's book that then, Thursday at 2:15.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, I'll get that scheduled and send a confirmation text shortly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome. Have a great day.
